title: First milestone
description: A milestone here with annotation_anchor=start and marker=false

title: This is a long span
description: This long span covers most of the duration of the x-axis, including the break in the x-axis

title: This is a shorter span
description: Height=2.2, y-offset=40, linewidth=24. This span has annotation_anchor=right and alignment=right so the label points at the end of the activity.

title: This is a short span
description: Height=2.2, y-offset=40, linewidth=8. This span has alignment=left so the label points at the start of the activity.

title: Post-break span
description: This span starts 8 hours after the 16 Mar tick so spacing after the break can be visually checked.

title: Left aligned milestone
description: This milestone has alignment=left.  The default markerfmt=o is a circle.

title: Left placed label
description: Placement=left forces the label to the left of the marker. This causes alignment=right and x-offset=-10
This is actually a milestone disguised as a span in the event the span is too small to be seen. vline=false
